compiled_state.title: Write failing structural boundary tests for all 7 PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE checkpoint fallbacks
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What
Create tests/skills/test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh — a new structural boundary test file with 7 independent test functions, one per non-interactive checkpoint fallback. Each test asserts that preplanning/SKILL.md (and ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md for CP7) contains the required PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE branching text at the corresponding checkpoint location.

## Why
Before implementing the non-interactive branches, establish failing tests that define what 'done' looks like for each of the 7 checkpoints. Tests must fail (RED) against the current SKILL.md. Per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5: structural boundary tests are the correct test type for non-executable LLM instruction files.

## Files to Modify
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (add RED markers for all 7 test functions)

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then per checkpoint)
Each test follows the same pattern:
- Given: current SKILL.md without non-interactive branches
- When: grep the relevant section of SKILL.md for PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE branching text
- Then: grep fails (exit non-zero) → test FAILS RED

## Test Functions (7 total)
1. test_cp1_no_epic_id_non_interactive — Phase 1 Step 1: grep for PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE near epic selection + exit/error message for non-interactive mode
2. test_cp2_escalation_policy_default — Phase 1 Step 1b: grep for PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE near AskUserQuestion + "Escalate when blocked" default text
3. test_cp3_scope_clarification_exit — Phase 1 Step 3: grep for PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE near "pause and ask" scope clarification + exit/error text for non-interactive
4. test_cp4_reconciliation_auto_apply — Phase 1 Step 4: grep for PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE near AskUserQuestion reconciliation + auto-apply + in_progress guard text
5. test_cp5_story_dashboard_suppress — Phase 4 Step 3: grep for PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE near "Present Story Dashboard" + suppress/skip text for non-interactive
6. test_cp6_final_approval_skip — Phase 4 Step 5: grep for PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE near AskUserQuestion final approval + skip text for non-interactive
7. test_cp7_ui_designer_interactivity_deferred — dispatch-protocol.md: grep for PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE reference wiring the existing INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED paths

## Implementation Notes
- Follow pattern from tests/skills/test-preplanning-design-review-loop.sh: extract section, grep for patterns
- Use Python to extract sections by heading to avoid false positives from surrounding text
- Each test function is independent (no shared state between functions)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — or run targeted: bash tests/skills/test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] All 7 test functions FAIL (RED) when run against current SKILL.md before implementation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh 2>&1 | grep -cE "^FAIL:" | grep -q "^7$"
- [ ] .test-index contains RED markers for all 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c '\[test_cp[0-9]\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -qE "^7$"
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry maps plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md to the new test file
  Verify: grep -q "test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
